finding: Repeated 8-block CMD18 reads completed through the lab-only PIO path with wait_dma=0, pio=1, 4096/4096 bytes copied, and err=0.
evidence: CMD18 poll reaches rint=0x0000402c and mista=0x00004000.
IDST remains 0 and no normal IDMAC descriptor-read stall appears in the CMD18 path.
interpretation: The H093 silence was not a hard CMD18 wedge. PIO reads continue, but they are too slow/noisy to be a practical root-rw proof path. This strengthens the conclusion that PIO is diagnostic infrastructure only.
next_best_step: Return focus to the real upstream blocker: why normal A733 SDMMC0 IDMAC cannot fetch descriptor word 0. Use any maintainer/vendor reply or newly found source-backed firmware/security/fabric evidence to form the next behavior patch.
guardrails: Do not treat PIO as an upstream fix.
Do not submit or rewrite patches from this diagnostic branch.
Do not expand scope into unrelated peripherals.
Cubie3 restored to vendor 5.15.147-21-a733 after testing.
